; Edit INITIAL: 0=dead, 1=alive. Grid is 8x8.
(define INITIAL (list
  (list 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 1 0 0 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 0 1 0 0 0 0)
  (list 0 1 1 1 0 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0)
  (list 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0)))
(define (at grid r c)
  (if (or (< r 0) (< c 0) (>= r 8) (>= c 8)) 0
      (nth (nth grid r) c)))
(define (neighbors grid r c)
  (+ (at grid (- r 1) (- c 1)) (at grid (- r 1) c) (at grid (- r 1) (+ c 1))
     (at grid r (- c 1))                            (at grid r (+ c 1))
     (at grid (+ r 1) (- c 1)) (at grid (+ r 1) c) (at grid (+ r 1) (+ c 1))))
(define (next-cell alive n)
  (cond ((and (= alive 1) (< n 2)) 0)
        ((and (= alive 1) (or (= n 2) (= n 3))) 1)
        ((and (= alive 1) (> n 3)) 0)
        ((and (= alive 0) (= n 3)) 1)
        (else alive)))
(define (step grid)
  (map (lambda (r)
    (map (lambda (c) (next-cell (at grid r c) (neighbors grid r c)))
         (range 0 8)))
    (range 0 8)))
(define (render grid)
  (string-join (map (lambda (row)
    (string-join (map (lambda (c) (if (= c 1) "●" "·")) row) " ")) grid) "\n"))
(println "=== GENERATION 0 ===")
(println (render INITIAL))
(println "\n=== GENERATION 1 (after one step) ===")
(println (render (step INITIAL)))
